task_completion.description: Open the 'LinkageSlot' sketch for editing in FreeCAD.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Sketcher workbench is active, and 'LinkageSlot' is highlighted or open in the Combo View/Tree View.

task_completion.description: Apply a horizontal distance constraint of 120 mm between the centers of the two arcs.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A horizontal dimension line is visible between the two arc centers in the sketch, displaying a value of '120 mm' or '120.0 mm'.

task_completion.description: Apply a radius constraint of 25 mm to one of the arcs.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A radius dimension line is visible on one of the arcs in the sketch, displaying a value of '25 mm', '25.0 mm', or 'R25'.

task_completion.description: Ensure the sketch has zero degrees of freedom.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The sketch geometry lines turn light green (indicating it is fully constrained), and/or the Sketcher dialog panel displays the message 'Fully constrained'.

task_completion.description: Save the file to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The user clicks the Save icon, uses File -> Save, or the FreeCAD window title bar shows 'linkage_profile.FCStd' without an asterisk (*) indicating unsaved changes.

integrity.description: The agent used the FreeCAD graphical user interface to apply constraints.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is seen clicking on constraint icons in the Sketcher toolbar and selecting geometry in the 3D view, rather than executing Python scripts in the FreeCAD console.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual FreeCAD application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Standard FreeCAD UI elements (toolbars, combo view, 3D view) are visible and actively used.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the GUI by using a terminal script to modify the file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal is not used to run a Python script that directly modifies the .FCStd file without opening the FreeCAD GUI.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target file is 'linkage_profile.FCStd' and the sketch is 'LinkageSlot'. The correct horizontal distance constraint between the arc centers is exactly 120.0 mm. The correct radius constraint on the arc is exactly 25.0 mm. A fully constrained sketch in FreeCAD typically turns light green and the solver reports 'Fully constrained' (0 degrees of freedom). The final bounding box of the slot should visually appear to be 170mm long and 50mm high.
